data.title: U.S. economic health limits decline in 10-year Treasury yield
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: BBH market strategists said in a report that the U.S. economy is still in good shape, limiting the room for the 10-year U.S. Treasury yield and the dollar to fall. The annual growth rate of the U.S. economy is well above the long-term trend growth rate of 1.8%. Importantly, the solid U.S. labor market conditions indicate that consumer spending will remain the main driver of economic growth. (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S. Economy Remains Strong, Limiting Treasury Yield Decline
data.description: According to Odaily, market strategists at BBH report that the U.S. economy continues to perform well, which restricts the potential decline in the 10-year U.S. Treasury yield and the dollar. The annual growth rate of the U.S. economy significantly exceeds the long-term trend growth rate of 1.8%. Notably, the robust condition of the U.S. labor market indicates that consumer spending will remain a key driver of economic growth.

Due to server resource shortage, DeepSeek has suspended API service recharge
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: DeepSeek has suspended API service recharge, and the button is gray and unavailable. In response, the official statement said, "Currently, server resources are tight. In order to avoid affecting your business, we have suspended API service recharge. The existing recharge amount can continue to be used, thank you for your understanding!" The official price list shows that the deepseek-chat model discount period will last until 24:00 on February 8, 2025, Beijing time. After the discount ends, it will be charged at 2 yuan per million input tokens and 8 yuan per million output tokens. The deepseek-reasoner model will be charged at 4 yuan per million input tokens and 16 yuan per million output tokens when it goes online. (Jinshi)

data.title: DeepSeek Suspends API Service Recharge Amid Resource Constraints
data.description:
According to Odaily, DeepSeek has temporarily halted API service recharges, with the button for this function appearing greyed out and unavailable. The company issued a statement explaining that due to current server resource constraints, they have paused API service recharges to prevent any potential business disruptions. Existing recharge balances can still be utilized, and users are asked for their understanding.

The official pricing list indicates that the promotional period for the deepseek-chat model will last until 24:00 on February 8, 2025, UTC+8. After the promotion ends, the pricing will be set at 2 yuan per million input tokens and 8 yuan per million output tokens. Meanwhile, the deepseek-reasoner model will be priced at 4 yuan per million input tokens and 16 yuan per million output tokens upon its launch.

data.title: The Bhutanese government transferred 377.77 BTC, equivalent to $37.28 million, to two unknown wallets
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, the Royal Government of Bhutan transferred 377.77 bitcoins to two unknown wallets, worth about 37.28 million US dollars. Currently, the Bhutanese government still holds 11,145 BTC, worth about 1.1 billion US dollars.

data.title: Bhutan Transfers Bitcoin Worth $37.28 Million to Unknown Wallets
data.description: According to Odaily, the government of Bhutan has transferred 377.77 bitcoins, valued at approximately $37.28 million, to two unidentified wallets. Despite this transaction, Bhutan's government still holds 11,145 bitcoins, which are worth around $1.1 billion.
